_note: Terrain tile-keys that have real PNG art at assets/terrain/<key>.png. Empty = the game draws the procedural tiles. Add a key here once its PNG is dropped in and it re-skins that ground everywhere. See docs/TERRAIN_ART_SPEC.md.
_grids_note: key -> N means an NxN super-tile set exists at <key>_<idx>.png (idx=(x%N)*N+(y%N)); the renderer places slices by tile position so facets span tiles and the single-tile grid is masked. Keys not listed use the single <key>.png.
